productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Casual Red Flats
description: The perfect way to complement your ethnic wear is to slip into these beautifully crafted slippers from carlton london. The synthetic V-shaped straps embellished with rhinestones add that extra spark to your personality. Add on a pretty clutch with these sandals and your ethnic or fusion wear, and you're all set to rule the party.UpperSynthetic midfoot straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in placeRhine stone embellishments for added stylePadded footbed for all-day comfort and styleOutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole with a floral groove on the forefoot for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
